links.description: Watch KNK’s uploads or follow their official socials.

officialYoutube.description: Music videos, behind-the-scenes clips, and performances.

varietyChannel.label: KNK variety channel
varietyChannel.description: JTBC appearances, Random Play Dance, and radio shows.

instagram.label: KNK Instagram

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.heading: Hi, I'm the person behind this KNK fan project
aboutMe.subheading: A homebase for the Inspirits of Gravity community, in four languages.

story.title: Story
story.body: I’ve followed KNK since their debut in 2016. Every comeback reminded me how hard it can be for new fans to catch up, so I started cataloging performances, variety moments, and lyrics in one place.

items.showcase: Compile comeback timelines and highlight stages
items.community: Collaborate with international fans to keep info accurate

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Want to contribute data, report an issue, or work together? Email or DM me anytime.

links.title: Community
links.heading: Follow KNK everywhere
links.subheading: Official socials and fan hubs gathered in one place.

footer.byline: Handcrafted by Pink, Inspirits of Gravity.
footer.rights: All songs, lyrics, photos, and videos belong to 220 Entertainment and their respective creators.
footer.aiNotice: Some summaries are AI-assisted but always reviewed by humans.
footer.contactHint: Spotted an error or want to collaborate?
footer.copyright: © {year} KNK fan site. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Welcome to the KNK fan guide
hero.subtitle: Start with Why KNK, then play the must-watch stages, songs, and variety clips without leaving the page.

sections.whyTitle: Why KNK belongs on your playlist
sections.whyDescription: Towering formations, layered harmonies, and self-produced storytelling define why KNK converts listeners.
sections.stageTitle: Iconic stages to feel their presence
sections.stageDescription: From Random Play Dance chaos to cinematic blocking, watch the stages that made fans stay.
sections.songDescription: Press play on these tracks to hear the range between emotive ballads and explosive dance anthems.
sections.varietyTitle: Variety moments that show their personalities
sections.varietyDescription: See how KNK handles interviews, acoustic stages, and improv games without leaving the guide.

embed.error: Unable to load this video. Try opening it on YouTube.

hero.heading: Must-watch stages & shows
hero.subheading: Each card opens an iconic Random Play Dance, radio live cut, or interview in a new tab so you can queue them up.

hero.title: Report an issue or request a feature
hero.subtitle: Tell me about bugs, onboarding ideas, or custom site work—your message goes straight to my inbox.

form.messagePlaceholder: Share as much detail as you can. Links and timestamps are super helpful.
form.attachmentHint: Max 5MB. PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, PDF, TXT, or LOG files.
form.success: Thanks! I’ll reply as soon as possible.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

validation.messageMin: Tell me a bit more (at least 10 characters).
validation.messageMax: Message can be up to 5000 characters.

hero.heading: Rediscover every KNK era
hero.subheading: From debut hits to hidden b-sides, explore each album in order.

hero.heading: Meet every member of KNK
hero.subheading: Tap a card to learn more about current and former members.
